effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The griffon flies up to their speed, and can make a free strike against each creature who makes an opportunity attack against them during this movement.
A griffon acting this turn unleashes a hideous screech at one enemy within 5 squares of them, forcing that creature to make an **Intuition test**.

Winds bluster and blow across the encounter map. Until the end of the encounter, each creature who can't fly or isn't mounted on a flying creature takes a −3 penalty to stability, and any forced movement effect targeting such a creature moves them an additional 5 squares.

effects.tier1: 7 damage; the griffon can shift 1 square
effects.tier2: 10 damage; the griffon shifts up to 2 squares
effects.tier3: 13 damage; the griffon shifts up to 3 squares

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: If this ability is used as part of the Charge main action, the griffon can grab one of the targets.

effects.name: Special
effects.effect: The griffon must be flying and must have a creature or object grabbed.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The griffon flies up to half their speed toward the ground, then sends the creature or object they've grabbed hurtling down. The creature or object hits the ground to turn the area into an impact crater, and takes falling damage that can't be reduced in any way.

features.name: Wing Buffet
features.target: Each creature or object in the area

effects.name: Special
effects.effect: A target object must be size 2 or smaller.

effects.tier1: Push 3; A < 0 the forced movement is vertical
effects.tier2: Push 4; A < 1 the forced movement is vertical
effects.tier3: Push 5; A < 2 the forced movement is vertical

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The griffon halves the damage, ignores any nondamaging effects associated with it, and shifts up to 2 squares.
While grabbed by the griffon, a creature has a double bane on the Escape Grab maneuver.
Any power roll that could knock the griffon or their rider prone takes a bane.

effects.tier2: 11 damage; one target is pushed up to 2 squares; the other target is vertical pushed up to 2 squares
effects.tier3: 14 damage; one target is pushed up to 2 squares and knocked prone; the other target is vertical pushed up to 3 squares

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The griffon shifts up to their speed along the ground in straight line. Each enemy who comes adjacent to the griffon during this shift can choose to either take 5 damage or be knocked prone.

features.name: Power Wing Buffet
features.target: Each creature or object in the area

effects.tier1: Push 2; M < 0 the forced movement is vertical
effects.tier2: Push 4; M < 1 the forced movement is vertical
effects.tier3: Push 6; M < 2 the forced movement is vertical

features.name: Circle and Strike
features.trigger: The griffon flies directly above a creature within distance.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The griffon dives down onto the target, taking no damage from falling if they reach the ground. The target takes 3 damage for each square the griffon dove, and if they have A < 2, they are grabbed or knocked prone.
While grabbed by the griffon, a creature has a double bane on the Escape Grab maneuver.
Any power roll that could knock the griffon prone takes a bane.
The griffon can attempt hide even while observed. Additionally, while no enemy has line of effect to them, the griffon can attempt to hide at the end of their turn.
